summary: TWO_COLUMN: 8-token vocab (the, cat, sat, on, a, mat, !, </s>) with fixed logits. ValueTracker T_tr sweeps temperature through 0.3, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0, 3.0, 1.0; always_redraw BLUE softmax-probability bars + token labels. Live RIGHT panel: T, argmax token + probability, Shannon entropy H in bits.
